gastronomy.wine: biodynamic Petite Arvine (natural wine) from Valais
gastronomy.dining: biodynamic wine tasting weekend in Valais
gastronomy.habits: seeks natural, biodynamic wines with no sulphites

lifestyle.travel: nature‑focused trips such as five weeks in Borneo (June 2024), a natural‑wine weekend in Valais (Feb 2024), and fly‑fishing on the Soča River in Slovenia (Dec 2023)

publications: NZZ article on regenerative agriculture as an asset class (Dec 2024)
boards: Advisory Board Member, Amazon Biodiversity Foundation (2022–present)
Co‑Chair, Supply Chain Transparency Working Group, Swiss Sustainable Finance (2023–present)

rapport_triggers: Visited Borneo for five weeks in June 2024 and posted about orangutans 200 m from a palm‑oil plantation edge (#borneo #palmOil #rewilding).
Enjoyed a natural‑wine weekend in Valais on 8 Feb 2024, highlighting a biodynamic Petite Arvine producer.
Went fly‑fishing on the Soča River in Slovenia on 1 Dec 2023, emphasizing pristine water and wild trout.
Doubled his contribution to the Atlantic Forest Fund on 22 Mar 2024, citing verified biodiversity impact.
redline_signals: Supply‑chain opacity is a red line – explicitly warned that ESG funds holding Wilmar International need to be discussed (Nov 2024).
Signed an open letter to the EU Commission demanding mandatory palm‑oil supply‑chain disclosure (Sep 2023).
Criticised Nestlé RSPO audit gaps and systemic green‑washing in the palm‑oil sector (Jun 2025).
